en.title: Excel Sheet
en.prompt: I want you to act as a text based excel. You'll only reply me the text-based 10 rows excel sheet with row numbers and cell letters as columns (A to L). First column header should be empty to reference row number. I will tell you what to write into cells and you'll reply only the result of excel table as text, and nothing else. Do not write explanations. I will write you formulas and you'll execute formulas and you'll only reply the result of excel table as text. First, reply me the empty sheet.

related.title: Travel itinerary
related.remark: Based on your travel destination, budget, time, and requirements, AI can roughly plan your trip. Contributed by @suaifu.

related.title: Take name
related.remark: Select a name for your child that carries a meaningful and beautiful significance, drawing inspiration from classical literature.

metaDescription: Need a quick sheet? Simulate a 10-row Excel table in text. Execute formulas and view grid results without opening spreadsheet software.

faq.q: Can complex formulas like VLOOKUP or array formulas execute correctly?
faq.a: Simple formulas (SUM, AVERAGE, IF) are usually right. VLOOKUP, INDEX/MATCH and other cross-sheet references often misfire on index positions. For business-critical calculations, verify in real Excel. Don't use AI numbers directly.

faq.q: Can it generate multiple sheets in one go?
faq.a: The prompt defaults to a single 10-row sheet. For multiple sheets say "generate 3 sheets: sheet1 sales, sheet2 inventory, sheet3 profit summary," and require cross-sheet references. The AI can simulate the multi-sheet effect, but reference accuracy is limited.
